You Tu Śį§Á™Ā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
You Tu (Śį§Á™Ā)was born in Yuzhang. Commoner of Poyang, asked by Cao Cao to lead men against Wu. He Qi and Lu Xun beat him. You Tu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. You Tu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
